textByHash.05249a55da5c57dd8df469d4bb53f5ead0b72555: You are looking for the Grail now adventurer?
textByHash.28ae5ac9aea374fe4f84b9ec13ce8223eedc0161: Take care adventurer, Mordred is an evil and powerful foe.
textByHash.2a39028d3aeb38e0ccd8dabffbe22956e072a235: I already gave you everything I had in my pockets.
textByHash.2a7e90cb9e9c30d1962960e7ed81c5e83585d5fc: All Knights of the Round thank you for your assistance in this trying time for us.
textByHash.2e516f411f78fed70f8c2924b704367c8d147fb1: Um... it's a really good sword?
textByHash.30253c2e8167ede2a2bb7f8fadcfed30e99202fb: We are true knights who fight for honour. Those Black Knights didn't fight fair, so we were unprepared. Most unchivalrous of them.
textByHash.36df003437e6f0cb13040dce25f3d43af28ef503: Thank you for your assistance in our time of need.
textByHash.42d098b3a639e342f5286c1cb2787bc78b16ad8b: The best of luck to you! Make the name of Camelot proud, and bring it back to us.
textByHash.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHash.97c235b373737862f5edb4ebcf7ee6207ed337fc: You just let me at them. We'll see how they like surprise attacks.
textByHash.9d14a3e6f9b61f2d9e0154a536597729ab7e19e8: In the amount of time it will take you to spell out Round Table Knights, you could have found the Grail.
textByHash.a056dbc838c9e18af4e256938db3681b59c5ea2e: Fortune favours us both then adventurer. I suggest you go and speak to King Arthur.
textByHash.af33ec16c41525c25e1d4deb386fac8d302e3eab: That is what we were hoping for from you, adventurer!
textByHash.e18d8d4537096639ebf039c927e0c16386aaf324: I am afraid not. Would that we could! Mordred and his cronies have been thorns in our side for far too long already!
textByHash.e5789d1a75fa6557a0d4c39afac3ef88497aa62b: Let me out! Let me out, I say!
textByHash.f9992d1cf752a10ed759c172fec8dc2e9828b24c: What am I supposed to do with that?
